Hot Copy sponsorship deck02
Why this works

Media buyers do not buy a logo. They buy trust transfer.

Hot Copy gives Flexifai a route into an iGaming audience through editorial context, not a cold ad unit.

Credibility

Flexifai appears alongside NEXT.io editorial, which gives the placement context and legitimacy.

Relevance

The newsletter format matches future-facing topics where AI, regulation, products and operators meet.

Referral path

The opening-line link gives interested readers a direct path to Flexifai’s site.

Consistency

A monthly run builds familiarity faster than a one-off paid post.

End-of-month performance recap

Recommended buy: three months for familiarity and recall.

Price: €1,500 per month06
Recommended activation

Three months gives the placement enough time to work.

Month 1

Introduce

Launch Flexifai as headline sponsor. Use the first month to create recognition with Hot Copy readers.

Month 2

Repeat

Keep the same sponsor line and landing page. Build familiarity instead of changing the message too soon.

Month 3

Convert

Use UTM data and LinkedIn engagement signals to sharpen the landing page and follow-up activity.

Commercial view: start with a three-month run at €4,500, then review performance and decide whether Flexifai keeps headline sponsorship longer.
€4,500 total
Suggested structure, monthly option available07
Next step

Approve the sponsorship window and we turn this around fast.

1. Confirm month

Choose the first sponsored month and any preferred article themes.

2. Send assets

Provide Flexifai logo, preferred landing page and UTM link.

3. Approve mockup

NEXT.io prepares the featured image treatment and sponsor line.

4. Go live

Hot Copy publishes with Flexifai in the featured image and opening line.

Flexifai gets visibility where attention starts.
